Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: footwear by form [300252212], footwear [300209280], accessories by location on the legs or feet [300211599], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Footwear with a relatively stiff sole and heel, and generally covering the foot at or below the ankle joint.
Schoeisel met een relatief stijve zool en hak dat gewoonlijk de voet tot op of onder het enkelgewricht bedekt.
Fußbekleidung mit einer relativ steifen Sohle und Ferse, in der Regel bedeckt sie den Fuß am oder unter dem Sprunggelenk.
Calçado com sola e calcanhar relativamente rígidos e geralmente cobrindo o pé na articulação do tornozelo ou abaixo dela.
أحذية ذات نعل وكعب صلبين نسبيًا، وتغطي القدم عمومًا عند مفصل الكاحل أو أسفله.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.; shoes

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)

Term_Source.Page: An outer covering for the foot, consisting of sole, vamp, quarter, and shank, low or high heels.; shoes

Source.Source_ID: 2000030231/Thornton and Swann, Glossary of Shoe Terms (1986)

Term_Source.Page: A generic term for any type of footwear, including boots, sandals, slippers, clogs, overshoes etc.; shoes

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
